name: ecommerce-frontend
description: Basic frontend project initialized with Git and npm.

scripts.build:js: terser scripts/app.js -o scripts/app.min.js -c drop_console=true -m && terser scripts/product.js -o scripts/product.min.js -c drop_console=true -m && terser scripts/cart.js -o scripts/cart.min.js -c drop_console=true -m && terser scripts/cart-page.js -o scripts/cart-page.min.js -c drop_console=true -m && terser scripts/auth.js -o scripts/auth.min.js -c drop_console=true -m
scripts.build: npm run build:js && npm run build:css
